description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized black SUV with a robust and streamlined body, featuring a prominent front grille and large, tinted windows. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with subtle chrome accents around the windows and door handles. The wheels are solid black with a five-spoke design, giving the SUV a sporty and urban appearance. The headlights and taillights are sleek and integrated into the body, while the side mirrors are compact and aerodynamic. The roof is slightly raised, providing ample headroom for passengers and cargo. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for both city driving and suburban environments.
description: A sleek black SUV with tinted windows, chrome accents, and five-spoke black wheels, designed for urban and suburban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, large windshield, and compact headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, tinted windows, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, rear hatch, and subtle rear bumper details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, windows, and wheel design.
